cadence_note: Weekly. SSSU publishes no machine-readable release calendar we could locate (stat.gov.ua release-calendar paths 404, and the SDMX registry's lastUpdatedAt annotations carry no values), so the cadence is set from the flows' own frequencies rather than a published schedule: the 112 accepted dataflows mix monthly, quarterly and annual FREQ, and the monthly 'operational data' flows (e.g. DF_EXTERNAL_TRADE_OF_GOODS_M_Q) are restated as figures firm up. A 7-day poll picks up monthly releases within a week without hammering an origin that already 500s on large slices. Revisit if a published calendar appears.
